title: Evangelion wall scrolls where can I buy them from the UK
display_title: Evangelion wall scrolls where can I buy them from the UK
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion wall scrolls - where can I buy them from the UK?             Quote Post by ununennium » Fri May 27, 2011 3:44 pm Hey, does anyone know where I can buy some evangelion wall scrolls from the UK, I don't mind importing however I like to order from places with good reputation. Thanks in advance.

[]:             Quote Post by The Triforce Fighter » Thu Jun 16, 2011 3:29 pm Hey, your best bet is to check out Amazon as I am sure they have a whole lot of Evangelion posters so I won't be surprised if they sell wall scrolls too. Failing that try anime conventions such as MCM in London or Manchester. All the main companies that sell anime related goods over in the UK are present. I can't name you any of these companies of the top of my head but I'm pretty sure if you visited the MCM website you could find a link leading to some of their homepages. I'm pretty sure the majority of them let your order stuff online. I hope that helps!
